findings.title: Log4j 2.14.1 with remote code execution (Log4Shell)
findings.description: log4j-core and log4j-api 2.14.1 are vulnerable to CVE-2021-44228 allowing RCE via JNDI lookup in logged strings

findings.title: Outdated Spring Boot 2.5.6 with multiple CVEs
findings.description: Spring Boot 2.5.6 parent POM has known vulnerabilities including Spring4Shell CVE-2022-22965

findings.title: Jackson databind 2.12.3 with deserialization vulnerabilities
findings.description: Jackson-databind 2.12.3 has known polymorphic deserialization vulnerabilities exploitable via crafted payloads

findings.title: Apache Commons Text 1.9 with string interpolation RCE
findings.description: commons-text 1.9 StringSubstitutor vulnerable to CVE-2022-42889 allowing RCE via script lookup prefixes

findings.title: Apache Commons IO 2.6 with path traversal issues
findings.description: commons-io 2.6 has CVE-2021-29425 path traversal vulnerability exploitable via user-controlled file paths
